name: microservices-project
description: Smart E-Commerce Microservices Application using Node.js, gRPC, Kafka, SQLite3, RxDB, REST and GraphQL

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix kafka-broker && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix product-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix customer-service
scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:broker" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:customer" "npm run start:gateway"
